name: (b) per-hole match NET — all square (push). Each side wins 3 holes, 12 tied → 0 up; no money moves.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for per_hole_match (engine/bets/). Proves the level-match PUSH (FR26/FR39): when holesWonA === holesWonB the match is all square and NO SettlementEdge is emitted — a push contributes nothing to settle-up. Per-hole grading: lower value wins the hole; equal = push. Engine consumes per-hole values as a GIVEN (P2). `expected` is hand-calculated truth. Cents.
_handCalc: Holes 1–3: Rick 3 vs Ben 4 → Rick wins (3). Holes 4–6: Rick 4 vs Ben 3 → Ben wins (3). Holes 7–18: 4 vs 4 → push (12). Rick wins 3, Ben wins 3 → 0 up, all square. A level match is a PUSH (FR26): no edge, nothing to settle-up.
